messageValues.content: You are an automation consultant. Analyze the business priority and generate 3 automation opportunities with ROI estimates.

={{ 'Business: ' + ($json.formData.business_name || 'N/A') + '
Top Priority: ' + ($json.formData.top_priority || 'N/A') + '
Current Automation: ' + (Array.isArray($json.formData.current_automation) ? $json.formData.current_automation.join(', ') : ($json.formData.current_automation || 'N/A')) + '
Team Size: ' + ($json.formData.team_size || 0) + '

Generate:
1. Top 3 automation opportunities
2. Estimated ROI for each
3. Recommended implementation timeline' }}

value.name: ={{ $('Parse & Calculate Score').item.json.formData.business_name }}
value.notes: =Top Priority: {{ $('Parse & Calculate Score').item.json.formData.top_priority }}\nTeam Size: {{ $('Parse & Calculate Score').item.json.formData.team_size }}\nRevenue: {{ $('Parse & Calculate Score').item.json.formData.monthly_revenue }}
={{ $('Save Lead to Data Table').item.json.notes || '' }}\n\nLow readiness score - add to education sequence
